title: ducrosia flabellifolia
intro: Ducrosia flabellifolia is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. Ducrosia flabellifolia is valued for its ability to alleviate various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health and protect against oxidative stress. The plant's leaves and fruits can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its health benefits.
